# color

The **color** field type — a sparse data-view type for CSS color values.

This barrel registers ONLY the `FieldIdentity` (label, icon, `coerce: String`)
in the `fields.identity` registry. Color is a *sparse* type: it ships only a
read-only table cell and no filter.

- `plugins/table` — the read-only `ColorCell` (`data-view.cell`): a small swatch
  tinted with the projected CSS color plus the raw color string.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Color field type: identity only. The read-only swatch cell lives in the plugins/table sub-plugin; color has no filter (sparse).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Fields.Identity` "color"
  - Uses: `fields.Fields`
- Core:
  - Uses: `fields.defineFieldIdentity`, `fields.defineFieldType`
  - Exports: Values: `colorFieldType`, `colorIdentity`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `fields/color/config`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`config`** — Color field type: config-render capability (hex/oklch popover picker for config-v2.fields.renderer) plus the colorField factory.
  - **`table`** — Color field type: data-view table cell (read-only color swatch).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
